headline: Eval run over 31 labeled patients (0 failed): 21 dev-labeled (3 disagreement(s)), 10 held-out (0 disagreement(s)). Care Gap sensitivity 100.0%, Risk sensitivity 100.0%, SDOH agreement 100.0%.

falsePositives.labelNotes: Diabetes (E11.9) has Observation/maria-chen-hba1c on file; CHF (I50.9) has Observation/maria-chen-bnp on file — both the conditions this dataset's Observation coding actually covers are monitored. Her depression (F33.1) has no corresponding Observation type established anywhere in this codebase, so that dimension is intentionally left out of this boolean rather than guessed at.

Procedural patient, condition mix ['diabetes','chf','depression']; buildObservationsForIndex(6, conditions) seeds HbA1c (LOINC 4548-4) and BNP (LOINC 30934-4) on file (depression has no monitoring convention). Per `_meta.labelingRules.careGap`, this is a 'no gap' patient.

S19 C1: 3-condition procedural patient (diabetes + CHF + depression; i=20, mix[6]); buildObservationsForIndex(20, conditions) seeds HbA1c (LOINC 4548-4) + BNP (LOINC 30934-4) + eGFR (LOINC 62238-1) on file with normal-range values. Care Gap agent's correct call is 'no gap' for each classifiable dimension.
